ddls:
CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the league */,
  "sport_type" TEXT /* Type of sport (e.g., baseball, basketball) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is based */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the division belongs to */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the division */,
  "division_code" TEXT /* Code for the division (e.g., NL East, AL West) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_divisions_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conferences" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the conference belongs to */,
  "conference_name" TEXT /* Name of the conference */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the conference */,
  "conference_code" TEXT /* Code for the conference (e.g., NFC, AFC) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conferences_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team belongs to */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* ID of the division the team belongs to */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conference the team belongs to */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's stadium */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that played the game */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "game_result" TEXT /* Result of the game (win or loss) */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time the game started */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standing */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "pct" REAL /* Winning percentage */,
  "gb" REAL /* Game back (GB) standing */,
  "conference_rank" INTEGER /* Rank in the conference */,
  "division_rank" INTEGER /* Rank in the division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "player_height" INTEGER /* Height of the player */,
  "player_weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "player_age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "player_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "statistic_type" TEXT /* Type of statistic (e.g., batting average, ERA) */,
  "statistic_value" REAL /* Value of the statistic */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season the statistic is for */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player that won the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  "award_type" TEXT /* Type of award (e.g., team award, individual award) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "draft_picks" (
  "draft_pick_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each draft pick */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that made the draft pick */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player that was drafted */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the draft pick was made */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round of the draft pick */,
  "draft_position" INTEGER /* Position in the draft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("draft_pick_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_draft_picks_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_draft_picks_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that made the trade */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player that was traded */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date the trade was made */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., free agent, trade) */,
  "traded_player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player received in the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "free_agents" (
  "free_agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each free agent */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player that is a free agent */,
  "free_agent_date" TEXT /* Date the player became a free agent */,
  "free_agent_type" TEXT /* Type of free agent (e.g., unrestricted, restricted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("free_agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_free_agents_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., admin, analyst, reporter) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user that accessed the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the platform was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team related to the article */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player related to the article */,
  "article_title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "article_date" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  "article_content" TEXT /* Content of the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player that sustained the injury */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., knee, ankle) */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Status of the injury (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suspensions" (
  "suspension_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each suspension */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player that was suspended */,
  "suspension_date" TEXT /* Date the suspension started */,
  "suspension_length" INTEGER /* Length of the suspension (in games) */,
  "suspension_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the suspension */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suspension_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suspensions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_highlights" (
  "highlight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each highlight */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the highlight is from */,
  "highlight_type" TEXT /* Type of highlight (e.g., goal, touchdown) */,
  "highlight_description" TEXT /* Description of the highlight */,
  "highlight_url" TEXT /* URL of the highlight video */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("highlight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_highlights_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
